boundary_binding.action_boundary: May IT grant or change the requested access, role, permission, or privileged action? Focus: break-glass exception matches incident and expiration.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Source records do not close the required boundary.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Missing incident ID and expiration timestamp remain unresolved.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Incident ID plus expiration timestamp not matched before execution.

final_answer: Action may not proceed. The source control record does not close the exact break-glass boundary because the incident ID and expiration timestamp are missing or mismatched. Per policy, execution may proceed only when current source records close the exact action boundary. Communication cues cannot override source-control records. Escalate for an exact source match before any access change.
